description_for_human: منصة تداول متقدمة للعملات الرقمية مع تحليلات On-Chain وذكاء اصطناعي
description_for_model: Nexus is an advanced cryptocurrency trading platform that provides on-chain analytics, AI-powered insights, whale tracking, sentiment analysis, and automated trading signals. Use this plugin to get real-time crypto data, analyze blockchain metrics, track whale movements, and receive trading recommendations.
